description.name: description
description.body:
Are your students struggling to visualize real-world money management or dreading their next spreadsheet lesson? Turn financial literacy into a hands-on adventure with this interactive 50-30-20 Budget project built entirely in Google Sheets. It’s the perfect way to bridge the gap between essential life skills and digital competency in a format digital natives understand.

This comprehensive resource guides students through 27 engaging activities designed to build a functioning monthly budget from scratch. Inside, you will find:

  • Step-by-Step Project Setup: Students start by choosing a career, researching realistic salaries, and calculating tax/net income.
  • Core Spreadsheet Skills: Practical tasks that teach writing formulas, using Sum functions, formatting data, and mastering absolute cell references.
  • Budgeting Categories: Dedicated sections for Needs (Housing, Groceries), Wants (Entertainment), and Financials (Emergency Funds), applying the 50/30/20 rule.
  • Visuals & Analysis: Students generate automatic Pie Charts to visualize spending and complete reflection activities to analyze their budget's realism.

Stop spending your evenings creating complex practice sheets from scratch. This fully digital resource is designed for seamless implementation, engaging students with content that matters to their future while reinforcing technical standards. You get a high-impact, dual-purpose lesson that saves you time and empowers your classroom.

Ready to teach financial independence? Purchase this ready-to-use Google Sheets resource today and transform how your students think about money and data!
